title: Pan-Seared German Lamb Cuts
description: A classic German dish featuring tender lamb cuts pan-seared to perfection. Served with a side of flavorful saudi spices.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and black pepper.
Heat the buttery in the skillet over medium-high heat until melted.
Sear the lamb for 2 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes or until the lamb reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
While the lamb is cooking, mix the saudi spices and arabian spices together in a small bowl.
After the lamb is done, remove it from the oven and sprinkle the spice mixture over the top.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving. Garnish with fresh parsley.
